## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / PDF Output

If applicable, add screenshots or attach the generated PDF.

## Environment

- **Browser**: (e.g. Chrome 125, Firefox 128)
- **OS**: (e.g. macOS 15, Windows 11)
- **Locale**: de / en

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
